message.text:
Add 'dotenv' dependency to the project and setup #file:playwright.config.ts  to load .env file first (default values) and then .env.local file. Make sure you override defaults if variables names conflict when loading .env.local file.

Also:
- Generate initial .env and .env.local files with 'USERNAME' and 'PASSWORD' variables, with no value defined.
- Add .env.local file to .gitignore file
- Modify #file:playwright.yml  workflow by adding a step to set up the .env.local file as a copy of .env.file and setting USERNAME and PASSWORD values based off two repository secrets with the same name.

renderedUserMessage.text:
<attachments>
<attachment id="file:playwright.yml" filePath="/Users/jgomez/qualitara-take-home/.github/workflows/playwright.yml">
name: Playwright Tests
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, master ]
jobs:
  test:
    timeout-minutes: 60
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: lts/*
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci
    - name: Install Playwright Browsers
      run: npx playwright install --with-deps
    - name: Run Playwright tests
      run: npx playwright test
    - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
      with:
        name: playwright-report
        path: playwright-report/
        retention-days: 30
</attachment>
<attachment id="file:playwright.config.ts" filePath="/Users/jgomez/qualitara-take-home/playwright.config.ts">
import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';

/**
 * Read environment variables from file.
 * https://github.com/motdotla/dotenv
 */
// import dotenv from 'dotenv';
// import path from 'path';
// dotenv.config({ path: path.resolve(__dirname, '.env') });

/**
 * See https://playwright.dev/docs/test-configuration.
 */
export default defineConfig({
  testDir: './tests',
  fullyParallel: true,
  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
  retries: 1,
  workers: 3,
  outputDir: 'generated/results',
  reporter: [['html', { open: 'never' }]],
  /* Shared settings for all the projects below. */
  use: {
    /* Base URL to use in actions like `await page.goto('')`. */
    // baseURL: 'http://localhost:3000',

    trace: 'retain-on-failure',
    screenshot: {
      mode: 'only-on-failure',
      fullPage: true,
    },
  },

  /* Configure projects for major browsers */
  projects: [
    {
      name: 'chromium',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
    },

    {
      name: 'firefox',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Firefox'] },
    },
  ],
});
</attachment>

</attachments>

toolCallRounds.response: Let me verify the final state of the key files:

All done. Here's a summary of every change made:

1. **`dotenv` installed** as a dev dependency.

2. **[playwright.config.ts](playwright.config.ts)** — replaced the commented-out dotenv block with active loading:
   - `.env` loads first (defaults)
   - `.env.local` loads second with `override: true` so its values win on conflicts

3. **[.env](.env)** and **[.env.local](.env.local)** created, each with empty `USERNAME=` and `PASSWORD=` variables.

4. **[.gitignore](.gitignore)** — `.env.local` added so credentials are never committed.

5. **[.github/workflows/playwright.yml](.github/workflows/playwright.yml)** — added a "Set up .env.local" step that:
   - Copies `.env` to `.env.local` as a base
   - Appends `USERNAME` and `PASSWORD` from the `secrets.USERNAME` / `secrets.PASSWORD` repository secrets (these append lines override whatever blank values were copied from `.env`)
